message.content:
{
  "archetype": "The Dorm Dynamo",
  "read": "Maria is a bright and driven student who's ready to shake off academic sluggishness and boost her confidence. She's likely to approach movement with a 'make-it-work' mindset, finding creative ways to squeeze in exercises amidst a busy schedule.",
  "modalities_youll_enjoy": ["bodyweight work", "home workouts", "outdoor recreation (parks or streets)"},
  "first_week_suggestion": "Start with short 10-minute morning bodyweight exercises (squats, push-ups, lunges) and commit to 3 times a week. Gradually increase duration or reps as the week progresses. Use online tutorials or YouTube videos for guidance. On weekends, take a 30-minute walk around the campus or nearby park.",
  "watch_out_for": "Getting too caught up in idealistic expectations, forgetting that consistency is key. Remember, every step forward counts, and progress is not always linear."
